ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the contact */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the contact resides */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the contact */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the contact is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country (e.g., US, CA, UK) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the country */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code for the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the country was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the address */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the industry is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the region is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_roles" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the contact */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is the primary role for the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_industries" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry associated with the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry was associated with the contact */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_regions" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region associated with the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was associated with the contact */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "contact1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first contact involved in the interaction */,
  "contact2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second contact involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the interaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the interaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_contact2_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact2_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_contact1_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact1_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the interaction type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
